post_push_thread_check.message: MANDATORY: Push detected. Run `gh pr view --json reviewDecision,comments,reviewThreads` and confirm 0 unresolved threads before declaring done.

pre_merge_ci_verify.message: MANDATORY: Before merging, run `gh pr checks` and confirm all checks pass. Show output.

stale_branch_cleanup.message: Housekeeping: {{count}} merged branches detected. Run `git branch --merged | grep -v main` and delete stale branches.

memory_consolidation.message: Context window approaching capacity. Run memory consolidation to promote STM → LTM before context degrades.

guardrail_spike.message: Safety guardrails triggered {{count}} times. Re-apply rule: {{rule}}

iteration_limit.message: Approaching max iterations ({{count}}/{{limit}}). Prioritize essential actions only.

tool_misuse.message: Tool misuse detected {{count}} times for: {{tools}}. Verify tool schemas before calling.
